name: Prompt Library
description: A library of reusable prompt templates in the left menu. Click one to insert it into the active session, filling in any {{variable}} fields first. Create, edit and remove templates in the same dialog. Plus a spotlight-style quick-insert (the Ctrl+Shift+P shortcut, or the command palette): a search bar over your prompts — type, then click or Enter to drop one into the session.
author: Cockpit
